Hip Pain CHAR 1 Health conditions: pain symptoms - hip pain in last 7 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
363 J3F J3F_INCISION_PAIN (J3F) Incisional Pain CHAR 1 Health conditions: pain symptoms - incisional pain in last 7 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
364 J3G J3G_JOINT_PAIN (J3G) Joint Pain CHAR 1 Health conditions: pain symptoms - joint pain (other than hip) in last 7 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
365 J3H J3H_TISSUE_PAIN (J3H) Soft Tissue Pain CHAR 1 Health conditions: pain
